texto: Music can also be a sensual pleasure, like eating food or sex. But its highest vibration for me is that point of taking us to a real understanding of something in our nature which we can very rarely get at. It is a spiritual state of oneness.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Terry Riley: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a fe. O trecho “Music can also be a sensual pleasure, like eating food or sex. But its highest vibration for me i…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que fe, nature, food pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de food e spiritual.

frase_original: Music can also be a sensual pleasure, like eating food or sex. But its highest vibration for me is that point of taking us to a real understanding of something in our nature which we can very rarely get at. It is a spiritual state of oneness.
